statusLine.command: input=$(cat); used=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.used_percentage // empty'); total_in=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_input_tokens // 0'); total_out=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.total_output_tokens // 0'); total=$((total_in + total_out)); [ -n "$used" ] && printf "Context: %.1f%% used | Tokens: %d (in: %d, out: %d)" "$used" "$total" "$total_in" "$total_out"
